repo_signals: L3 smoke for risk.compliance: tamper-evident audit trail, change approval gate, segregation of duties, SOC2/GDPR evidence retention, and control attestation
plain prose note with no repository or domain signal

retrieval_query: compliance audit trail change approval gate segregation of duties SOC2 GDPR evidence retention attestation control regulated workflow human gate

validation_smoke.name: risk.compliance L3 validation smoke
signals: every controlled action emits an immutable audit record with actor, time, and before/after state
each merged change carries an approval by a principal other than the author
evidence for each in-scope control is retained for the required period and retrievable
an attestation test proves the control executed on a representative transaction

diagnosis_smoke.name: risk.compliance diagnosis smoke
signals: controlled action with no corresponding audit record
author able to approve their own change
audit log mutable or lacking integrity protection
evidence purged before its retention period
control marked passing with no attestation that it actually ran
